Layout.title: next-intl Playground
Layout.tagline: Translations, formatting, routing, and patterns with Next.js.

Nav.serverComponentsDesc: Read translated strings inside async Server Components — zero client JS.
Nav.clientComponentsDesc: Use translations from Client Components for interactive content.
Nav.datesDesc: Format dates and times for the active locale with useFormatter.
Nav.numbersDesc: Format numbers, currencies, and percentages — separators flip per locale.
Nav.explorerDesc: Drive useFormatter() with live options and compare output across locales.
Nav.mixedRoutingDesc: Locale-prefixed vs unprefixed paths — see the three localePrefix modes side by side.
Nav.localeSwitcherDesc: Replay the current path under a different locale while preserving params.
Nav.browserLanguageDesc: Detect the user's preferred locale from the Accept-Language header via next-intl middleware.
Nav.cacheComponentsDesc: Combine next-intl with Next's Cache Components — 'use cache', cacheLife, cacheTag.

MixedRoutingDemo.alwaysNote: Every locale, including the default, carries a prefix.
MixedRoutingDemo.asNeededNote: Default locale stays bare; others get a prefix.
MixedRoutingDemo.neverNote: No prefix anywhere — locale is resolved via cookie or header.

LocaleSwitcherDemo.hint: Pick a locale — uses next-intl's typed Link with a locale prop; the URL prefix updates and the layout re-renders with the new locale.

CacheComponents.title: Cache components
CacheComponents.intro: Coming soon. Here's what this page will demo.
CacheComponents.useCacheBody: See how a cached Server Component reuses translated content across requests with a locale-scoped cache key.
CacheComponents.cacheLifeBody: Pin a translated section to seconds, minutes, or hours — and watch invalidation in real time.
CacheComponents.cacheTagBody: Tag translations with a key, then trigger updateTag from a Server Action to refresh just that surface.
CacheComponents.tryExplorer: Try the Explorer in the meantime

NotFound.title: This route is missing a translation key.
NotFound.subtitle: The URL you tried doesn't match any page in the playground. While you're here, type something into the boxes below — next-intl will format it live in your current locale.
NotFound.hint: Formatted via useFormatter() and useTranslations() in the {locale} locale — same APIs the rest of the playground uses.

BrowserLanguageDemo.currentNote: You're currently viewing the {locale} version because the URL prefix wins over the header. Visit / without a prefix to see header-based detection take effect.
